change_position_music_multi_title: Adjust the position of the selected {num} songs to
comment_not support: This song does not support getting comments
comment_refresh: This is already the comment of "{name}"
confirm_tip: Are you sure you want to do this?
create_new_folder_tip: Please enter a new folder name
deep_link_file_js_confirm_tip: Are you sure you want to import the custom source file "{name}"?
deep_link_file_lxmc_confirm_tip: Are you sure you want to import the list file "{name}"?
duplicate_list_tip: You have already collected the list "{name}", do you need to update the songs in it?
exit_app_tip: Are you sure you want to exit the app?
ignoring_battery_optimization_check_tip: IKUN Music is not in the whitelist of "Ignoring battery optimization", which may cause the system to pause when playing music in the background. Do you want to add IKUN Music to the whitelist?
list_add_tip_exists: This song already exists in the list, don't click me again~😡
list_create_input_placeholder: What name do you want to give it...
list_duplicate_tip: A list with the same name already exists, do you want to continue creating it?
list_edit_action_tip_exist: This song already exists in this list
list_error: Load failed😥, click to try again
list_export_part_desc: Select the save location of the list file
list_import_part_confirm: The imported list "{importName}" has the same ID as the local list "{localName}", do you want to overwrite the local list?
list_import_tip__alldata:
This is an "all data" backup file, you need to import it here:

Settings → Backup and Restore → List Data → Import List
list_import_tip__playlist:
This is a "list" backup file, you need to import it here:

Settings → Backup and Restore → List Data → Import List
list_import_tip__playlist_part:
This is a "single list" file, you need to import it here:

My List → Click the menu button on the right of any list name → Select "Import" in the pop-up menu
list_import_tip__setting: This is a "settings" backup file, the mobile version does not support importing this type of file
list_import_tip__unknown: Unknown type, please try to upgrade to the latest version and try again
list_remove_music_multi_tip: Are you sure you want to remove the selected {num} songs?
list_remove_tip: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"?
list_select_local_file_empty_tip: No songs found in the current folder
list_select_local_file_result_failed_tip: Found {total} songs, successfully added {success}, failed {failed}, you can check the error log for failed songs
list_select_local_file_temp_add_tip: Found {total} files that meet the requirements, they have been quickly added to the current list, and now will enter the file tag reading process, please do not exit the application!
list_sync_confirm_tip: This will replace the songs in "{name}" with the songs in the online list, are you sure you want to update?
metadata_edit_modal_failed: Save failed, please check the error log for details
metadata_edit_modal_form_parse_name: Parse song name and artist from file name
name: Song name: {name}
notifications_check_tip: You have not allowed IKUN Music to display notifications, or the "MusicService" notification in the IKUN Music notification settings is disabled, which will prevent you from using the notification bar to pause, switch songs, etc. Do you want to enable it?
open_storage_not_found_title: External storage card not found, please manually enter the path below to specify the external storage
open_storage_select_path_tip: Tip: For external storage, if you still cannot access it after granting storage permission, you can click the button below to select the path to allow access.
open_storage_title: Please manually enter the path below to specify the external storage
play_detail_setting_show_lyric_progress_: Allow adjusting playback progress by dragging lyrics
play_detail_todo_tip: What do you want to do? No, this feature has not been implemented yet😛, but you can try to long press to locate the currently playing song (only valid for playing songs in "My List")
player__error: Audio loading error, switch to the next song in 5 seconds
player__getting_url_delay_retry: Server is busy, retry in {time} seconds...
setting__other_resource_cache: Resource cache management (including song, image cache)
setting_backup_all: All data (list data and settings data)
setting_backup_part: List data (universal with desktop version list backup file)
setting_backup_part_export_list_desc: Select songlist backup file save location
setting_backup_part_export_list_tip_zip:
📦File packing...
It may take some time if the file is too large⏳
setting_backup_part_import_list_tip_runn:
🚀Importing hard...
It may take some time if the list is too large⏳
setting_backup_part_import_list_tip_unzi:
📦File parsing...
It may take some time if the file is too large⏳
setting_backup_part_scan_local_music_ful: Full disk scan (may scan non-music files)
setting_basic_always_keep_statusbar_heig: By default, the software will dynamically determine whether to reserve space for the system status bar, but if the software's interactive content overlaps with the status bar content on your device, you can enable this option to always reserve space for the system status bar.
setting_basic_auto_hide_play_bar: Automatically hide play bar when keyboard is popped up
setting_basic_font_size: Font size setting (takes effect after restart)
setting_basic_home_page_scroll: Enable horizontal scrolling of vertical home page
setting_basic_source_direct: Audition interface (this is the last choice...)
setting_basic_source_temp: Temporary interface (some functions of the software are not available, it is recommended to use this interface only when the test interface is not available)
setting_basic_source_test: Test interface (almost all functions of the software are available)
setting_basic_startup_push_play_detail_s: Open play details page after startup
setting_basic_theme_auto_theme: Follow the system's light and dark mode to switch themes
setting_basic_use_system_file_selector_t:
After enabling this option, importing backup files, custom sources, etc. will not require storage permission, but it may not be available on some systems.

If you cannot import files after enabling this option, you can disable this option and fall back to the software's built-in file selector.
setting_dislike_list_tips:
1. One per line, if the song or artist name contains the "@" symbol, you need to replace it with "#"
2. Specify a song by a certain artist: Song name@Artist
3. Specify a song: Song name
4. Specify an artist: @Artist
setting_list_add_music_location_type: Position when adding songs to the list
setting_list_click_action: Automatically switch to the current list to play when clicking on a song in the list (only valid for "Songlist" and "Toplist")
setting_lyric_desktop_permission_tip: The desktop lyric function needs to grant IKUN Music the permission to display floating windows in the system permission settings to use it. Do you want to go to the relevant interface to grant this permission?
setting_other_cache: Cache management (including song, lyric, error log and other caches, it is not recommended to clear if there are no song playback related problems)
setting_other_log: Error log (log when an exception occurs during operation)
setting_other_local_music_folder_path_de: Scanned folder path, long press to delete
setting_play_audio_offload_tip:
Enabling audio offload can save power consumption, but on some devices, it may cause all songs to prompt "audio loading error" or "cannot play the entire song", which is caused by a bug in the current system.

For those who encounter this problem, you can disable this option and completely restart the application to try again.
setting_play_auto_clean_played_list_tip: In random play mode, when switching songs by clicking on a song in the "same list as the play list", if "Automatically clear the played list" is enabled, the played songs will participate in random play again.
setting_play_cache_size_save_tip: Cache setting is complete, it will take effect after restarting the application
setting_play_handle_audio_focus: Automatically pause playback when other apps play sound
setting_play_handle_audio_focus_tip: Takes effect after restarting the application
setting_play_s2t: Convert Chinese lyrics to traditional Chinese
setting_play_show_notification_image: Show song album cover image in the notification bar
setting_sync_code_blocked_ip: The IP of the current device has been blocked by the server!
setting_sync_code_label: Enter the connection code for the first connection
setting_sync_host_value_error_tip: The address needs to start with "http://" or "https://"!
setting_sync_port_tip: Please enter the sync service port number
songlist_open_input_placeholder: Enter songlist link or songlist ID
songlist_open_input_tip:
1. Cross-source opening of songlists is not supported, please confirm whether the songlist to be opened corresponds to the currently selected songlist source
2. If you encounter a songlist link that cannot be opened, please feel free to give feedback
3. Kugou source songlists do not support opening with songlist ID or concept version link, but support opening with normal version link or Kugou code
storage_file_no_match: The selected file does not meet the requirements!
storage_file_no_select_file_failed_tip: Failed to select file using system file selector, do you want to fall back to the software's built-in file selector?
storage_permission_tip_disagree: You liar, I just asked you, you said you agreed, but you refused in the end, humph 🥺
storage_permission_tip_disagree_ask_agai:
This function cannot be used because you have permanently refused Luoxue to access the phone storage😫.
If you want to continue, you need to go to 👉System Permission Management👈 to set Luoxue's storage permission to "Allow"
storage_permission_tip_request: To use this function, you need to allow Luoxue to access the phone storage, do you agree and continue?
sync__dislike_mode_merge_tip_desc: Merge the content of the two lists and remove duplicates
sync__dislike_mode_other_tip_desc: "Cancel sync" will not use the "disliked songs" list sync function
sync__dislike_mode_overwrite_tip_desc: The list of the overwritten party will be replaced with the list of the overwriter
sync__dislike_mode_title: Select the sync method for the "disliked songs" list with "{name}"
sync__list_mode_merge_tip_desc: Merge the two lists together, the same songs will be removed (the songs of the merged party will be removed), and different songs will be added.
sync__list_mode_other_tip_desc: "Cancel sync" will not use the list sync function.
sync__list_mode_overwrite_tip_desc: The list with the same ID as the overwritten party will be deleted and replaced with the list of the overwriter (lists with different IDs will be merged together). If "Completely overwrite" is checked, all lists of the overwritten party will be removed and then replaced with the list of the overwriter.
sync__list_mode_title: Select the list sync method with "{name}"
timeout_exit_btn_wait_tip: The timer has ended, waiting to exit...
timeout_exit_label_isPlayed: Wait for the song to finish playing before stopping playback
timeout_exit_tip_max: You can only set a maximum of {num} minutes
toggle_source_failed: Failed to switch source, please try to manually specify other sources in the search page to search for this song to play
toggle_source_try: Trying to switch to other sources...
user_api_max_tip:
You can only have 20 sources at the same time🤪
If you want to continue importing, please remove some old sources to make room
user_api_note: Note: Although we have isolated the running environment of the script as much as possible, importing scripts containing malicious behavior may still affect your system, please import with caution.
user_api_remove_tip: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"?
user_api_update_alert: New version of custom source "{name}" found
version_tip_downloaded: The installation package has been downloaded.
version_tip_failed:
Failed to download the installation package, you can retry or go to the project address to manually download the new version to update.
💡Tip: Generally, you can update normally by clicking retry a few more times!
version_tip_latest: The software is up to date, enjoy it~🥂
version_tip_min: Switched to background download, you can go to "Settings → Software Update" to reopen this pop-up window
version_tip_unknown: Failed to get the latest version information, it is recommended to manually go to the project address to check for new versions
version_title_latest: 🎉 The current version is the latest 🎊
version_title_unknown: ❓ Failed to get the latest version information ❓
